description: Browse and read comics, manga, and books from Komga with reading progress sync. Enriches locally-scanned Jellyfin items with metadata and cover images from your Komga server.
name: Komga
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with a self-hosted Komga server. Provides metadata enrichment, cover images, and bidirectional reading progress sync.

versions.changelog: v1.0.0.4: Add Clear Saved Credentials button. Fix checkbox visibility with is=emby-checkbox. Add console logging for debugging.
v1.0.0.3: Fix event listeners to prevent stacking. Add save confirmation popup. Use plugin-specific variable names to avoid conflicts.
v1.0.0.2: Add confirmation popup on test connection. Clarify API key usage.
v1.0.0.1: Update to Jellyfin 10.11.x ABI. Fix null reference in reading progress sync.

- Initial alpha release
- Plugin skeleton with Komga API client
- Metadata provider for enriching local comics
- Image provider for cover fetching
- Scheduled tasks for metadata and reading progress sync
- File transformation integration for reader redirect
